title: taraxacum karatavicum
intro: Taraxacum karatavicum is a species of the dandelion plant, known for its distinctive yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and constipation, due to its prebiotic properties and diuretic effects, which help to regulate water balance in the body. Taraxacum karatavicum is also rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and improving overall health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and tincture, are commonly used to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system.
